headline: A Look At Darden Restaurants (DRI) Valuation After Recent Pullback And 12% Undervaluation Narrative
summary: How Darden Restaurants stock has been trading Darden Restaurants (DRI) has seen mixed share performance recently, with a 2.9% decline over the past week, a small gain over the past month, and a 2.3% decline over the past 3 months. Over longer periods, the stock shows a 4.0% gain year to date, a 1.6% decline over the past year on a total return basis, and multi year total returns that sit above 40% over 3 years and above 60% over 5 years.
